{{Quote|While droned vehicles and starships have generally proven inferior against living opponents, if Lott has developed a reliable method of slave-rigging AT-ATs and AT-STs, this could be a devastating development.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]|<ref name="WBC" />}}
'''Arndall Lott''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], born in [[48 BBY/Legends|48 BBY]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kwenn/Legends|Kwenn]]. Lott joined the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] where he showed considerable aptitude for [[Walker/Legends|walker]] operations. After serving a two-[[Standard year/Legends|year]] tour under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers]], Lott was promoted to the rank of [[General/Legends|General]] and placed in command of [[Walker Operations and Tactics]] at the [[Imperial Army training center|training center]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jardeen IV]]. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Lott joined [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Iolan Gendarr]] in forming a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] splinter faction.

==Biography==
Arndall Lott was a native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kwenn/Legends|Kwenn]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], born in [[48 BBY/Legends|48 BBY]]. Lott attended the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]], and joined the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] upon graduation. He was promoted to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] after showing considerable skill in [[Walker/Legends|walker]] operations, and also served a two-[[Standard year/Legends|year]] tour of duty under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers]] as part of the army detachment assigned to the [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]]. Eventually, Lott achieved the rank of [[General/Legends|general]], and was given command of [[Walker Operations and Tactics]] at the [[Imperial Army training center]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jardeen IV]]. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], Lott fled the planet along with [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Iolan Gendarr]] and the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Reliance (Star Destroyer)|''Reliance'']], who had been assigned to protect Jardeen IV. The pair formed their own Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] faction, where Lott designed a primitive [[Slave circuit|slave-rigging]] system<ref name="WBC" /> inspired by the famed [[Katana fleet|''Katana'' fleet]]<ref name="DESB">''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref> to control multiple walkers such as [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] and [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]] via the use of remote operators. Lott's invention was used to devastating effect in coordinated assaults on [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and civilian bases to obtain supplies and equipment. The New Republic charged Lott with [[Treason/Legends|treason]], sedition, destruction of New Republic property, murder of New Republic personnel, destruction of private property, and murder. A reward of 75,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] was offered by the New Republic for Lott's capture.<ref name="WBC" /> Lott's design was later used in the control systems of the [[TIE/D automated starfighter]] by the resurrected Emperor's [[Dark Empire]].<ref name="DESB" />

==Personality and traits==
Arndall Lott was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was 1.95 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. He had a moustache and smoked. Lott was a skilled commander and instructor, and an expert tactician in the field of ground assault operations and squad-based tactics.<ref name="WBC" />

==Skills and abilities==
Lott was trained and skilled in the use of [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], [[blaster artillery]], and vehicle-mounted blasters. He was knowledgeable about [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] and their languages. A [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]], Lott was trained in [[Unarmed combat/Legends|unarmed combat]], survival, and stealth techniques, and was able to operate ground vehicles, [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles, and walkers. He could also repair walkers, and program and repair [[Computer/Legends|computers]].<ref name="WBC" />

==Equipment==
General Lott wore black-[[Color/Legends|colored]] Imperial Army [[field armor]], was armed with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], and carried a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] and a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]].<ref name="WBC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Arndall Lott was profiled in [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], a sourcebook published in [[1993]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. Lott's illustration was provided by [[Rob Caswell]].
